rationale: Response naturally integrates Korean regulatory baseline (KFTC marketplace rules, MRFTA Article 23(1), Online Platform Review Guidelines) and jurisdiction-specific enforcement history (Naver, Kakao Mobility, Coupang fines in KRW). It uses the three briefed metrics (on-time delivery, claim ratio, pricing) as the substantive backbone of its defensibility analysis and tailors documentation requirements specifically to what KFTC expects, not generic compliance checklists.
